reason: Successfully navigated to SuperAgent, selected the target agent "QA-20260619-030304-1r2i", verified its status as "idle", sent a math question, and received a correct response containing "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with title "SuperAgent" and sidebar showing two agents.
Located agent "QA-20260619-030304-1r2i" in the sidebar — Found it in the agent list on the left sidebar.
Clicked the agent in the sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent detail page (URL: http://localhost:47891/agents/qa-20260619-030304-1r2i-jcs03n).
Verified agent status — Status indicator shows "idle" in the top right, which is one of the expected states (running or idle).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message successfully entered in data-testid="home-message-input".
Clicked the send button — Message successfully submitted; page navigated to a new chat session with URL containing session ID.
Waited for agent response — Response received in approximately 1 second (agent worked for 1s).
Verified response contains "4" — The agent's response clearly displays the number "4" as the answer to the math question, exactly as expected.
